3220710.name: Master Thief
3220710.description:
Slip into the shadows and outsmart security in this thrilling multiplayer heist game!

Master Thief challenges you to become the ultimate burglar in a world where cunning and stealth are your greatest assets.

🕵️‍♂️ Features:
  • Cunning Heists: Overcome clever obstacles and solve intricate puzzles to secure your loot.
  • Cooperative Gameplay: Team up with friends in multiplayer mode to pull off daring robberies.
  • Skill Progression: Embark on a variety of missions to hone your thieving abilities and grow your ill-gotten fortune.
  • Humorous Twists: Experience a lighthearted take on the world of high-stakes burglary.

Do you have what it takes to become the Master Thief? Gather your crew, plan your heist, and prepare for the ultimate test of stealth and strategy!
3220710.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
